R0232.title: SaaS Third-Party App Authorization Abuse
R0232.definition: Employees grant high-privilege SaaS applications access to mail, drive, or customer data.
R0232.description: Employees grant high-privilege SaaS applications access to mail, drive, or customer data.
R0232.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
